# BuilderGraph — Doug Kvamme (@kvadou)

> Verified developer profile built from public GitHub activity. This is a machine-readable summary of a software builder's skills, projects, and availability.

## About This Builder

Doug Kvamme is a full-stack AI/agentic engineer based in Minneapolis, MN. He built 9+ production applications as a sole developer at Story Time Chess using AI-native workflows with Claude Code. Previously recruited engineering leadership at Meta, Nerdery, and Robert Half.

## Skills & Tech Stack

Primary: TypeScript (51%), JavaScript (48%)
Frameworks: Next.js, React, Prisma, Tailwind CSS, Express, NextAuth, Stripe, Anthropic SDK, Vite, Supabase, OpenAI SDK
Databases: PostgreSQL, Supabase, Neon, pgvector
AI/Agentic: Claude Code (custom skills, hooks, sub-agents), Anthropic SDK, AI-native development methodology
Infrastructure: Heroku, Vercel, Render, Cloudflare

## Builder Classification

Full-Stack Builder · AI/ML Builder · Infrastructure Builder · Prolific Shipper

## Activity Signals

- Total public repos: 14
- Active repos (last 90 days): 10
- Recent commits (last 30 days): 87
- Primary language: TypeScript

## Notable Projects

- OpsHub — Operations platform: sales pipeline, scheduling, analytics (React, Express, PostgreSQL)
- StoryTimeTutors — Tutor portal: curriculum, training, gamification (Next.js, Prisma, NextAuth)
- Franchising — Franchise CRM + prospect portal (Next.js, Prisma, NextAuth v5)
- ATS — Applicant tracking system replacing Greenhouse (Next.js, Prisma, Clerk, pgvector)
- Intel — BI & resource planning platform (Next.js, Turborepo, Prisma, Radix UI)

## Availability

Status: Open to opportunities
Looking for: Project-based AI/automation consulting or senior engineering roles
Location: Remote preferred, Minneapolis area hybrid OK
Compensation target: $150K-200K
